name: Vinegar and Your Refrigerator
recipeInstructions:
1. If ugly, black mildew stains have sprouted on your refrigerator, wipe the areas down with pure vinegar. Rinse with clean water and wipe dry.
2. Keep the inside and outside of your fridge shiny and clean with a mixture of half vinegar, half water. Concentrate on the areas that receive the most use, like around the handles and where little fingerprints have pushed it closed. Use a dry cloth to buff it to a shine.
